calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-05-2003 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
James A. Michel, Esq., 951-4949, for defendants Larry L. Bloom and Pamela Bloom, demurring to the complaint
David J. Foran, Esq., 440-6668, appearing for plaintiff's counsel Joseph A. Sacramento on behalf of plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- DEFENDANTS LARRY L. BLOOM AND PAMELA BLOOM'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT -- OVERRULED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (DAG/301/CW) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-05-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
James A. Michel, Esq., 951-4949, for defendants Larry L. Bloom and Pamela Bloom, moving to strike the complaint
David J. Foran, Esq., 440-6668, appearing for plaintiff's counsel Joseph A. Sacramento on behalf of plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court granted DEFENDANTs LARRY L BLOOM AND PALEMA BLOOM'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. FIVE DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (DAG/301/CW) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
